meta.name: PRSM UPGRADE: FTNSTokenSimple via UUPS
meta.description: Upgrades FTNSTokenSimple proxy to a new implementation address. Calls `upgradeTo(address)` on the proxy, gated by DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE. PRECONDITIONS for cosigning: (1) new implementation contract source-verified on Basescan, (2) auditor SAFE-TO-DEPLOY verdict on new implementation, (3) diff vs. current implementation publicly disclosed in advance, (4) 4-of-5 governance threshold (NOT 3-of-5 operational), (5) 24-hour timelock has elapsed where applicable per Q4 governance-adjustability. THIS IS A GOVERNANCE TX, NOT OPERATIONAL.
